entries.description: r.workspace() — persona-/role-scoped UI surfaces. Live demo with 3 workspaces and the WorkspaceShell switcher.
r.workspace() — persona-/role-scoped UI surfaces. Live demo with 3 workspaces and the WorkspaceShell switcher.

source.raw:
r.workspace({
    id: "admin",
    label: "demo:workspace.admin",
    icon: "settings",
    order: 1,
    access: { roles: ["Admin"] },
    nav: ["demo:nav:order-list", "demo:nav:order-edit", "demo:nav:audit-log"],
    default: true,
  })

r.workspace({
    id: "dispatch",
    label: "demo:workspace.dispatch",
    icon: "list",
    order: 2,
    access: { roles: ["Dispatcher", "Admin"] },
  })

r.workspace({
    id: "driver",
    label: "demo:workspace.driver",
    icon: "user",
    order: 3,
    access: { roles: ["Driver", "Admin"] },
  })

entries.description: Beyond CRUD — when your domain refuses to fit a table.

source.raw:
r.writeHandler(
    "counter:create",
    z.object({ name: z.string().min(1) }),
    async (event, ctx) =>
      counterExecutor.create({ ...event.payload, count: 0 }, event.user, ctx.db),
    { access: { roles: ["Admin"] } },
  )

handlerBody.raw:
async (event, ctx) =>
      counterExecutor.create({ ...event.payload, count: 0 }, event.user, ctx.db)

source.raw:
r.writeHandler(
    "counter:reset",
    z.object({ id: z.uuid() }),
    async (event, ctx) =>
      // Admin reset: last-writer-wins is intentional — there's no useful
      // concurrent-reset race to guard against.
      counterExecutor.update(
        { id: event.payload.id, changes: { count: 0, lastIncrementedBy: "" } },
        event.user,
        ctx.db,
        { skipOptimisticLock: true },
      ),
    { access: { roles: ["Admin"] } },
  )

r.queryHandler(
    "counter:detail",
    z.object({ id: z.uuid() }),
    async (query, ctx) => counterExecutor.detail(query.payload, query.user, ctx.db),
    { access: { openToAll: true } },
  )

handlerBody.raw: async (query, ctx) => counterExecutor.detail(query.payload, query.user, ctx.db)

entries.description: Delivery flows plus notifications. Package tracking, minus the tracking.

source.raw:
r.writeHandler(
    "ticket:create",
    z.object({
      title: z.string().min(1),
      description: z.string().optional(),
      assigneeId: z.uuid().optional(),
      priority: z.enum(["low", "normal", "critical"]),
      status: z.string().default("open"),
    }),
    async (event, ctx) => ticketExecutor().create(event.payload, event.user, ctx.db),
    { access: { roles: ["Admin", "Support"] } },
  )

      title: z.string().min(1),
      description: z.string().optional(),
      assigneeId: z.uuid().optional(),
      priority: z.enum(["low", "normal", "critical"]),
      status: z.string().default("open"),
    })

entries.description: Production-pattern ES sample: r.defineEvent (versioned) + r.eventMigration + ctx.appendEvent + r.projection + r.multiStreamProjection + ctx.loadAggregate (asOf) + ctx.archiveStream + ctx.queryProjection.

source.raw:
r.defineEvent(
    "invoice-approved",
    z.object({ amountCents: z.number().int(), approvedBy: z.string() }),
    { version: 2 },
  )

r.defineEvent(
    "invoice-acknowledged",
    z.object({ approverId: z.string(), approverDisplayName: z.string() }),
    { version: 2 },
  )

r.writeHandler(
    "invoice:create",
    z.object({ customer: z.string() }),
    async (event, ctx) =>
      invoiceExecutor.create(
        { customer: event.payload.customer, status: "draft" },
        event.user,
        ctx.db,
      ),
    { access: { roles: ["Admin"] } },
  )

handlerBody.raw:
async (event, ctx) =>
      invoiceExecutor.create(
        { customer: event.payload.customer, status: "draft" },
        event.user,
        ctx.db,
      )
